title: 25 undocumented environment variables
description: Environment variables used in code but not in contract: REACT_APP_API_URL, EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL, API_VERSION, ALLOWED_ORIGINS, DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_NAME, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD, DB_POOL_MAX, DB_POOL_MIN, DB_IDLE_TIMEOUT, DB_CONN_TIMEOUT, DB_SSL_CA, DB_SSL_CERT, DB_SSL_KEY, DB_STATEMENT_TIMEOUT, DB_QUERY_TIMEOUT, CLIENT_ORIGIN, GAME_CLIENT_ORIGIN, ADMIN_CLIENT_ORIGIN, PLAYER_SERVICE_URL, LEADERBOARD_SERVICE_URL, ACHIEVEMENTS_SERVICE_URL, CUSTOMIZATION_SERVICE_URL
probable_cause: Code references environment variables not listed in the contract file
remediation: Add missing variables to the environment contract file
